backend/main.mo: Main backend canister defining rich-text types with heading levels, essay/page storage, access control, and CRUD/query methods for essays, pages, and user profiles.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module converting old rich-text structures into the new format with heading-level support, transforming stored pages and essays during upgrades.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features to related frontend files, components, and test requirements for heading-level support and rendering.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Prewritten summaries of all frontend files describing routing, components, editors, rendering logic, and rich-text handling with heading support.
frontend/index.html: Basic HTML entrypoint loading the React application via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Sets up TanStack Router routes, handles authentication state, and triggers the profile setup modal when required.
frontend/src/components/admin/EssayEdito: Provides a full editor for creating and updating essays, including rich text parsing, formatting ranges, metadata fields, and image handling.
frontend/src/components/admin/EssayManag: Displays a list of essays with edit and delete controls and opens EssayEditor for creating or modifying entries.
frontend/src/components/admin/PageEditor: Allows editing of static site pages, converting between plain text and RichText blocks and updating page content and link lists.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Layout component providing navigation, authentication controls, responsive mobile menu, and conditional admin link display.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal shown to first‑time users allowing entry and saving of a required display name.
frontend/src/components/RichTextRenderer: Renders RichText blocks into React elements with support for spans, headings, lists, quotes, code, and images.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages a backend actor tied to the current identity, refetching dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Manages Internet Identity authentication state, login flow, and persistence using Dfinity AuthClient in a React context.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Provides custom React Query hooks for fetching and mutating user profiles, pages, writing content, and essays via an actor API.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind-based global styles, color themes, typography, and prose formatting for the app.
frontend/src/lib/markdownExport.ts: Converts RichText blocks to Markdown and triggers a client-side download of the generated .md file.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app with React Query and Internet Identity providers.
frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx: Renders the About page by fetching CMS page content and displaying it with a rich text renderer.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Displays an admin-only dashboard with tabs for editing pages and managing essays.
frontend/src/pages/ContactPage.tsx: Renders the Contact page, showing page content and optional link list.
frontend/src/pages/EssayDetailPage.tsx: Shows a published essay with metadata, tags, hero image, and rendered rich text.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Loads and displays the home page content, offering initialization of default pages if missing.
frontend/src/pages/WritingPage.tsx: React page that loads essays, tags, and writing-page content, supports tag filtering, and renders a navigable list with loading skeletons.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS config extending colors, layout, animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project metadata describing existing features, new feature requests, and versioned state for a WYSIWYG heading-control update.
